info.title: Marz API
info.description:
Backend de Marz. Fuente de verdad del contrato HTTP entre marz-api y marz-front.
Se consume con `oapi-codegen` (server) y `openapi-typescript` + `openapi-fetch` (client).

503.description: Service Unavailable. Possible codes: auth_provider_unavailable, me_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_kind. Note: kind=agency also produces 400 (enum validation). See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: select_kind_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Possible codes: validation_failed (with field_errors). See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: onboarding_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

409.description: Conflict. Possible codes: invalid_state, handle_taken. See §4.1.8.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Possible codes: avatar_not_found, validation_failed (with field_errors). See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: onboarding_failed, lookup_account. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: url_required, url_invalid. See §4.1.8.

429.description: Too Many Requests. Possible codes: rate_limited. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: enrichment_failed. See §4.1.8.

503.description: Service Unavailable. Possible codes: enrichment_unavailable. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, body_too_large, content_type_required. See §4.1.8.

404.description: Not Found. Possible codes: account_not_found. See §4.1.8.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Possible codes: unsupported_content_type. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: presign_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: validation_error. See §4.1.8.

429.description: Too Many Requests. Possible codes: rate_limited. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: read_body, verify_error. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

413.description: Payload Too Large. Possible codes: pdf_too_large. See §4.1.8.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Possible codes: invalid_website_url, description_required, pdf_unreadable. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: init_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

404.description: Not Found. Possible codes: token_not_found. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: process_failed. See §4.1.8.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Possible codes: brief_validation_failed, validation_failed. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: create_campaign_failed. See §4.1.8.

404.description: Not Found. Possible codes: campaign_not_found. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: get_brief_failed. See §4.1.8.

post.description:
Test-only. Creates a test account or returns an existing one.
Requires `X-Test-Secret` header. Never available in production.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: create_test_account_failed. See §4.1.8.

post.description:
Test-only. Forces a test account into a specific onboarding state.
Requires `X-Test-Secret` header. Never available in production.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_status, invalid_kind. See §4.1.8.

404.description: Not Found. Possible codes: account_not_found. See §4.1.8.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: set_onboarding_failed. See §4.1.8.

delete.description:
Test-only. Soft-deletes a test account.
Requires `X-Test-Secret` header. Never available in production.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: delete_test_account_failed. See §4.1.8.

tier.description: Tier declarado por el creator en paso C4

required_headers.description: Headers que el cliente debe incluir en el PUT a S3

max_bytes.description: Tamaño máximo del archivo en bytes
